howItWorks.step1_desc: Sign up and upload your media info and proposal to join the AI review queue.
howItWorks.step2_desc: AI reviews suitability, location, and content within 24 hours; after admin approval, your media appears on the map.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Explore approved media worldwide on the map and filter by budget, location, and media type.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Inquire on media you like and get AI-recommended matches that fit your budget and timeline.

testimonials.item1_quote: AI review finished within 24 hours – saved us a lot of time!
testimonials.item2_quote: Convenient to find global media in one place.
testimonials.item3_quote: Matching accuracy improved our contract conversion rate.
testimonials.item4_quote: Checking locations on the map and filtering made our workflow much more efficient.

cta.title: Go global with XtheX today
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a media owner or advertiser, AI connects you. Start for free!

faq.q1: How do I register as a media owner?
faq.a1: Click 'Register as Media Owner' in the menu or sign up and log in to the dashboard. Upload your media info and proposal, and we'll guide you through AI review and approval.
faq.q2: How long does AI review take?
faq.a2: Initial AI review is usually complete within 24 hours. After we review suitability, location, and content, admin approval is required before your media appears on the map. Contact us for urgent cases.
faq.a3: Media owner registration and advertiser exploration are free. Platform fees may apply when contracts are signed; see our policy or contact us for details.
faq.a4: Yes. Data is stored and transmitted with encryption and managed according to applicable laws and our security policy. We do not use or share your data beyond the stated purposes.
faq.a5: We have media in 50+ countries; you can explore by region and country on the map. We're expanding – contact us if you're looking for a specific region.

apply.lead: Cuéntanos tu empresa y cómo te gustaría colaborar. Responderemos tras la revisión.
apply.form_description: Completa los campos obligatorios. Para la web usa formato https://

about.hero_tagline: The global platform connecting outdoor advertising worldwide with AI
about.vision_paragraph: We're breaking down barriers in outdoor advertising so media owners and advertisers can connect across borders. We're transforming proposal review, matching, and contracts with AI so everyone can use screens worldwide.
about.mission_item_1: Fast, accurate approval with 24/7 AI review
about.mission_item_2: Optimal media matching via real-time global map exploration
about.mission_item_3: Trust through secure e-signature and payment systems
about.problem1: Traditional outdoor advertising is hard to discover and search
about.solution1: Global real-time map exploration and AI filtering
about.problem2: Proposal review is slow and subjective
about.problem3: Inefficient matching between media and advertisers
about.solution3: AI-recommended matching by budget, location, and duration
about.solution4: Secure deals with e-signature and integrated payment
about.testimonial1_quote: AI review finished in 24 hours – saved time. Finding global media is easier now.
about.testimonial2_quote: Found the right location on the map and matching was accurate.
about.testimonial3_quote: Higher approval rate led to faster deals.
about.testimonial4_quote: E-signature made the contract process much smoother.
about.faq_q1: How do I register as a media owner?
about.faq_a1: Sign up and upload your proposal at /dashboard/partner.
about.faq_q2: How long does AI review take?
about.faq_q3: What does registration or usage cost?
about.faq_a3: Registration and exploration are free. Fees apply when a deal is closed.
about.faq_a4: We use encryption and comply with GDPR; webhooks and APIs are secured.
about.faq_a5: You can explore 50+ countries and major media in real time.
about.faq_a6: Web is optimized now; app is planned for 2026.

partnerApi.title: API para partners
partnerApi.subtitle: Crea claves API para leer tu inventario y webhooks para cambios casi en tiempo real.
partnerApi.keys_hint: El secreto completo solo se muestra una vez al crearla. Revoca y crea otra si la pierdes.
partnerApi.revoke_confirm: ¿Revocar esta clave? Dejará de funcionar al instante.
partnerApi.secret_warn: Cópiala ahora y guárdala con seguridad. No volverá a mostrarse.
partnerApi.docs_list: Solo devuelve medios de tu propiedad. Usa Authorization: Bearer <clave> o X-API-Key. PATCH actualiza campos parciales.
partnerApi.docs_patch: Envía solo los campos a cambiar: mediaName, price, description, globalCountryCode, tags, audienceTags, location { address, lat, lng }. No se pueden actualizar medios archivados.
partnerApi.since_hint: Usa since=ISO para sincronización incremental (updatedAt posterior).
partnerApi.webhook_lead: Hacemos POST JSON cuando se edita, elimina o cambia el estado de publicación. Solo HTTPS; sin firma en v1.
partnerApi.empty_usage: Aún no hay tráfico de API.

autoBidding.title: Puja automática
autoBidding.subtitle: Define presupuesto, región y fechas para enviar consultas automáticas a medios publicados que cumplan los criterios. Recibirás una notificación del sistema si se crean consultas.
autoBidding.explain_body: Las reglas activas crean consultas para medios publicados que aún no hayas contactado, dentro del periodo, con precio igual o inferior al tope (o sin precio).
autoBidding.notify_hint: Si se crea alguna consulta, se añade una notificación del sistema (desactiva SYSTEM en ajustes si no la quieres).
autoBidding.countries_label: Códigos de país (separados por coma; vacío = todas)
autoBidding.default_template: [Puja auto] Solicitud de presupuesto para {mediaName}. Tope {budget} KRW, periodo deseado {period}. Indique disponibilidad y especificaciones.
autoBidding.cooldown: Se ejecutó hace poco. Espera o fuerza desde el panel.

help.meta_description: XtheX Help Center — FAQ and customer support
help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to your questions about XtheX.
help.faq_q1: How do I make an advertising inquiry?
help.faq_a1: Browse our media directory, select a media you're interested in, and click 'Inquire'. You can also send inquiries directly from the media detail page.
help.faq_a2: The process is: Inquiry → Quote review → Campaign draft → Submit → Media owner confirmation. You can also book multiple media at once using the omnichannel cart.
help.faq_a3: We currently support credit cards, bank transfers, and corporate cards. International payments are processed via PayPal and Stripe. More options are being added.
help.faq_a4: When you upload a media proposal, our AI analyzes content, location, and suitability within 24 hours. AI scores and comments are auto-generated, followed by admin approval before publishing.
help.faq_a5: Yes, registration and basic features (browsing, AI recommendations) are free for both media owners and advertisers. Platform fees apply only when a campaign contract is finalized.
help.faq_q6: What documents are needed to register media?
help.faq_a6: At least one media photo, location info, and pricing are required. A business registration certificate can boost your trust score.
help.faq_q7: How do I set campaign duration?
help.faq_a7: When creating a campaign, you can set start/end dates or specify duration in weeks. Our AI media mix will recommend optimal media based on your timeline.
help.faq_a8: Yes, media from 50+ countries are registered. Use currency and region filters to explore media in your target market.
help.faq_a9: Full refund for cancellations before campaign start. Pro-rated refunds apply for mid-campaign cancellations. See our Terms for details.
help.faq_a10: All data is encrypted in storage and transit. We comply with GDPR and privacy regulations. Your data is never shared with third parties beyond service operations.
help.faq_q11: How do I use the media comparison feature?
help.faq_a11: Select up to 4 media from the explore page and click 'Compare' to view pricing, CPM, impressions and more side by side.
help.faq_q12: What if I have a technical issue?
help.faq_a12: Use the contact form below or email support@xthex.com. We respond within 24 business hours.
help.contact_subtitle: Couldn't find your answer in the FAQ? Send us a message below.
help.form_success: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
help.form_error: Failed to send. Please try again.

welcome.step1_desc: XtheX is the world's largest outdoor ad marketplace — connecting media owners and advertisers with AI across 50+ countries.
welcome.step2_desc: Browse outdoor media worldwide using our map and filters. Search by location, budget, and media type to find the perfect fit.
welcome.step3_desc: Enter your budget and targeting info, and AI will recommend the optimal media mix. Start your first campaign now!

billing.meta_description: View payments, download invoices, manage payment methods, autopay, and security settings.

billing.demo_banner: Below is demo data. After sign-in, this may be replaced with account-linked information.
billing.currency_note: Amounts convert to the display currency selected in the site header (KRW, USD, JPY, EUR). Rates are illustrative mock values.
billing.pdf_print_hint: In the print dialog, choose “Save as PDF” to download your invoice.
billing.change_method_hint: Tap “Set default” to change your primary card.
billing.autopay_desc: Automatically charge approved invoices on the due date. (Demo: stored in this browser only.)

trends.meta_description: Explore out-of-home trends by city—popular formats, benchmark budgets, and case studies—with map popups and PDF export.
trends.title: Regional OOH trend report
trends.subtitle: Demo insights across major cities. Click markers for detail, then print or save as PDF for the full report or a single region.
trends.map_hint: Click a marker on the map to open that city’s trend detail.
trends.pdf_print_hint: In the print dialog, choose “Save as PDF”.
trends.report_footer: XtheX demo report; not live market data.

seoul.name: Seoul
seoul.popular_media: Subway PSD · Gangnam & Hongdae digital boards
seoul.trend_summary: Digital OOH is growing on commute and social routes; prime evening slots are more competitive.
seoul.case_body: Three-week Gangnam/Hongdae digital mix delivered ~118% of planned impressions (demo benchmark).

tokyo.name: Tokyo
tokyo.trend_summary: Landmark screens plus business districts remain the preferred mix for launches.
tokyo.case_body: Office digital + Shibuya hero boards improved reach to IT decision-makers (demo scenario).

nyc.name: New York
nyc.trend_summary: Premium digital plus proximity formats stand out for retail and fintech.
nyc.case_body: Two-week Manhattan core push supported store visits (demo readout).

shanghai.name: Shanghai
shanghai.trend_summary: Mall + CBD dual coverage and large-format demand are rebounding quickly.
shanghai.case_body: Lujiazui + mall digital mix lifted awareness among young urban buyers (demo).

london.name: London
london.trend_summary: Sustainability and programmatic buying are trending; transit + roadside digital stay reliable.
london.case_body: West End digital plus buses helped grow offline footfall (demo).

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.trend_summary: Strong tourism and luxury demand; landmark hero units command relatively firm CPMs.
dubai.case_body: Downtown / Dubai Mall area mix maximized international visitor reach (demo).

media_reviews.title: Reviews & ratings
media_reviews.content_placeholder: Share your experience with this media…
media_reviews.sign_in_prompt: Sign in to write a review.
media_reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to share feedback.
media_reviews.error_already_reviewed: You have already reviewed this media.
media_reviews.report_desc: Flag this review for admin review. You can only report the same review once.
media_reviews.report_success: Report received. Our team will review it.

guided_tour.help_rerun_hint: Replay the header walkthrough from the beginning. Sign-in required.
guided_tour.help_sign_in: Please sign in to run the tour.

intro.title: Quick tour of XtheX
intro.body: We’ll walk through the top bar—explore, planner, search, and more. You can skip anytime and restart later from Help.

explore.title: Explore media
explore.body: Browse approved OOH inventory on the map with filters. Start here when shaping a campaign idea.

planner.title: Campaign planner
planner.body: Enter budget, audience, and region to get an AI-suggested media mix—great for turning a brief into numbers.

templates.title: Campaign templates
templates.body: Pick a goal and industry sample to pre-fill the planner. Fast way to try scenarios.

search.title: Global search
search.body: Find media by name, region, or tags from the header search field.

cart.title: Omni cart
cart.body: Add multiple placements and continue quotes or inquiries in one flow. Open it from the bag icon.

account.title: Account
account.body: Sign in for inquiries, dashboards, and notifications. Menus adapt to advertiser vs. media-owner roles.

outro.title: You’re set
outro.body: Jump into Explore or the planner. Need this again? Open Help and run the guided tour any time.

developers.meta_description: XtheX API reference, sample code, endpoint explorer, and integration guides for analytics and CRM.
developers.hero_subtitle: Explore public endpoints, copy sample requests, run quick tests, and connect XtheX to your analytics and CRM stack.
developers.overview_lead: How to work with XtheX programmatically.
developers.overview_p1: XtheX exposes Next.js Route Handlers under /api/*. Many routes require a signed-in session (NextAuth cookies) or admin credentials. Use this hub to understand the surface area before you automate workflows.
developers.overview_p2: For high-volume or partner integrations, prefer server-to-server calls from your backend so secrets and session cookies never ship to browsers you do not control.
developers.base_url_hint: In production, set NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL (or derive the host from your deployment). Browser samples below use the current origin.
developers.endpoints_note: Representative routes only; the codebase may include additional internal or admin endpoints. Always verify auth and rate limits before production use.
developers.endpoint_stats: Published media counts and headline stats for marketing surfaces.
developers.endpoint_weather: Current weather by city query (requires OPENWEATHER_API_KEY on the server).
developers.endpoint_explore: Filter and paginate published OOH media for maps and listings.
developers.endpoint_autocomplete: Typeahead suggestions for media names, tags, and locations.
developers.endpoint_recommend: AI media-mix recommendation from multipart brief + optional creative.
developers.endpoint_feedback: Submit 1–5 star feedback with optional message (rate limited).
developers.endpoint_inquiry: Create or manage advertising inquiries (session typically required).
developers.endpoint_campaign_list: List campaign drafts and submissions for the current user.
developers.endpoint_onboarding: Onboarding completion flags for the current user (anonymous-safe fallback).
developers.endpoint_nextauth: NextAuth.js sign-in, session, and OAuth callbacks.
developers.endpoint_chat: AI assistant chat for signed-in experiences.
developers.sample_note: Replace the host when calling from another environment. The examples use GET /api/stats as a simple smoke test.
developers.try_note: Runs a same-origin GET from your session. Results depend on environment (database, API keys).
developers.int_ga_p1: Add GA4 to your marketing site or embedded XtheX pages using gtag.js or Google Tag Manager. Create a GA4 property and copy the Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXX).
developers.int_ga_p2: Place the snippet in the root layout or GTM container so page views fire on route changes (use Next.js navigation events or GTM’s History Change trigger).
developers.int_ga_snippet:
<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-XXXXXXXX"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());
  gtag('config', 'G-XXXXXXXX');
</script>
developers.int_ga_p3: For SPA frameworks, push virtual page_view events when locale or primary routes change so funnels stay accurate.
developers.int_sf_p1: Connect campaign and inquiry data to Salesforce using REST APIs, Platform Events, or middleware (Zapier, MuleSoft, custom worker).
developers.int_sf_li1: XtheX backend receives inquiry or campaign events (webhook or job queue).
developers.int_sf_li2: Middleware maps fields to Lead, Opportunity, or custom objects.
developers.int_sf_li3: OAuth 2.0 JWT bearer or named credentials secure server-to-server calls.
developers.int_sf_p3: Contact XtheX partnerships if you need a managed connector or additional event types.
developers.guide_step1_body: Use the endpoint table and Try API section against staging or localhost. Confirm which routes need cookies vs. public access.
developers.guide_step2_body: Move calls to your backend, add retries, logging, and respect rate limits. Never expose admin keys or service tokens in client bundles.
developers.guide_step3_body: Wire GA4 or your data warehouse for funnel analytics; sync CRM objects from Salesforce when deals progress. Extend payloads only through versioned contracts.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication, passkeys, and signed-in devices.
security.demo_db: Database is not configured; security changes may not persist.
security.totp_desc: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, or similar to generate one-time codes.
security.totp_on: Authenticator is enabled for this account.
security.totp_scan: Scan the QR code, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
security.backup_hint: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose your phone.
security.email_desc: Receive a short code by email for sensitive actions (when wired to your flow).
security.sms_desc: Save a phone number in E.164 format. Production SMS requires Twilio (or similar) credentials.
security.sms_enable_flag: Enable SMS-based second factors where supported
security.sms_stub: SMS provider not fully configured on the server.
security.passkey_desc: Sign in with Face ID, Touch ID, or a security key where supported.
security.devices_desc: Devices that have registered with this browser key after login.

encryption.setup_subtitle: Advertisers can encrypt inquiry text and phone numbers to your public key. Only your private key (kept offline) can decrypt them.
encryption.step_generate: Generate a key pair and download the private key file.
encryption.step_store_private: Store the private key safely (password manager or offline backup). Never upload it to XtheX.
encryption.step_publish_public: Paste the public key below and save. It is stored on your account only.
encryption.public_spki_ph: Paste SPKI base64 after generation, or from your backup
encryption.warning_private: If you lose the private key, encrypted inquiries cannot be recovered.
encryption.toast_keygen: Private key downloaded. Save the public key to your account.
encryption.owner_hint: Paste your PKCS#8 private key (PEM) to decrypt. It never leaves this browser.
encryption.decrypt_failed: Decryption failed. Check your private key.

notificationsPrefs.title: Custom alerts by category
notificationsPrefs.subtitle: Turn a category off to hide those notifications in your bell menu and stop new ones of that type from appearing. Other categories are unchanged.
notificationsPrefs.demo: Database is not configured; preferences are not saved.
notificationsPrefs.cat_inquiry_desc: When advertisers inquire about your media.
notificationsPrefs.cat_media_approved_desc: Your listing passed review and went live.
notificationsPrefs.cat_media_rejected_desc: Your listing needs changes after review.
notificationsPrefs.channels_subtitle: Choose how we may reach you outside the in-app bell. SMS requires a verified phone when we add messaging.
notificationsPrefs.ch_push_desc: Browser or device push when supported.
notificationsPrefs.ch_email_desc: Transactional messages to your account email.
notificationsPrefs.ch_sms_desc: Text messages when SMS is enabled for your account.
notificationsPrefs.quiet_subtitle: During this window, push, email, and SMS are paused. In-app notifications still appear in the bell.
notificationsPrefs.quiet_hint_channels: Applies to push, email, and SMS only.
notificationsPrefs.quiet_hint_overnight: If “from” is later than “to” (e.g. 22:00–07:00), the quiet period spans midnight.

offline.badge_aria: Estás sin conexión. Puede mostrarse datos guardados.
offline.cached_hint: Mostrando notificaciones guardadas. Se actualizarán al volver en línea.
offline.stats_cached_banner: Sin conexión: mostrando las últimas estadísticas guardadas en este dispositivo.
offline.history_cached_banner: Sin conexión: si hay una lista guardada para estos filtros en este dispositivo, se muestra.

notificationHistory.title: Historial de notificaciones
notificationHistory.subtitle: Filtra por fecha, categoría, leído y favoritos. Marca leído/no leído y usa la estrella.
notificationHistory.empty: No hay notificaciones con estos filtros.
notificationHistory.load_error: No se pudieron cargar las notificaciones.
